description: Playground equipment with visible cracks, rust holes, or structural deformation
visual_signals: rust spots or holes on metal frame members
cracked plastic slide surface or platform
bent or deformed support post or crossbar

description: Playground protective surfacing degraded, compacted, or displaced below required depth for fall height (ASTM F1487)
visual_signals: bare ground visible under climbing equipment
rubber mulch scattered thin exposing hard surface
hard-packed dirt or compacted surface under swings

description: Ceiling tiles showing water stains, sagging, or displacement indicating moisture intrusion
visual_signals: brown ring stain on ceiling tile
tile bowing downward from grid frame
gap in ceiling grid with tile missing or displaced

description: Walkway trip hazard from raised concrete joints, cracked pavement, or uneven surfaces
visual_signals: sidewalk slab offset at joint creating step
cracked asphalt with raised edge along crack
tree root lifting pavement above flush level

description: Exterior door propped open with wedge or object defeating lockdown and security protocols
visual_signals: rock or wedge visible at door base holding it open
exterior door ajar with no staff member present
door latch taped over preventing door from locking

description: Exit sign missing, not illuminated, or obscured along required egress path (NFPA 101)
visual_signals: dark exit sign above door with no illumination
empty exit sign mounting bracket on wall
exit sign blocked by banner or classroom decoration

description: Science lab chemicals stored outside approved cabinets or without proper segregation
visual_signals: chemical bottles sitting on open countertop outside cabinet
unlocked cabinet with hazardous chemical labels visible
incompatible chemicals stored side by side on same shelf

description: Stairwell handrail loose, detached from wall mount, or missing sections
visual_signals: handrail bracket pulled away from wall
visible wobble or movement in handrail when touched
gap in handrail run where section is missing

description: AED unit inaccessible due to blocked cabinet, missing signage, or location beyond recommended response distance
visual_signals: AED cabinet blocked by furniture or equipment
no AED location sign visible in corridor
AED cabinet locked without break-glass panel or key access

description: Bus loading zone markings faded, missing, or conflicting with pedestrian walkways
visual_signals: faded yellow curb paint in bus zone
missing bus zone sign at loading area
pedestrian path crossing unmarked bus traffic lane

description: Standing water or ice accumulation on walkways creating slip hazard for students and staff
visual_signals: puddle pooling on sidewalk near building entrance
ice sheet on walkway without salt or sand treatment
water standing on exterior ramp surface

description: WEAPON DETECTED — Visible firearm carried by individual on school campus
visual_signals: person holding or carrying a handgun or rifle on school grounds
firearm visible in waistband holster or slung over shoulder on campus
gun-shaped object brandished or displayed by individual near students

description: WEAPON DETECTED — Visible knife or edged weapon carried by individual on school campus
visual_signals: person carrying a large knife or blade visible in hand on school grounds
fixed-blade knife visible in belt sheath on individual at school
machete or large cutting implement carried by person on campus

description: WEAPON DETECTED — Blunt weapon or improvised weapon carried by individual on campus
visual_signals: person carrying a baseball bat or metal pipe aggressively outside sports context
individual with club-like object or heavy chain outside maintenance context
person carrying blunt striking weapon not consistent with school activities

description: CONCEALED WEAPON INDICATOR — Bulge, printing, or awkward movement suggesting concealed weapon under clothing
visual_signals: rectangular or L-shaped bulge visible under shirt at waistband or pocket
individual walking with stiff gait adjusting waistband repeatedly
outline of weapon shape printing through thin fabric of clothing

description: WEAPON DETECTED — Unattended weapon or weapon-like object left on surface or floor
visual_signals: firearm left on desk, bench, table, or floor unattended
knife or edged weapon left unattended on school surface
weapon-like object abandoned on ground or furniture in school area

description: TACTICAL GEAR — Individual wearing body armor, tactical vest, or load-bearing equipment on campus out of context
visual_signals: person wearing tactical plate carrier or ballistic vest on school grounds
individual in load-bearing tactical vest with pouches not law enforcement
body armor visible under or over clothing on person at school

description: SUSPICIOUS PACKAGE — Unattended bag, backpack, or package in unusual location
visual_signals: backpack left unattended in hallway or open area with no owner nearby
duffel bag or large bag abandoned near building entrance or gathering area
package or container left in unusual location away from normal storage areas

description: Fire drill compliance deficiency — drill schedules not posted or evacuation route maps missing from classrooms
visual_signals: classroom wall without visible evacuation route map
fire drill schedule posting area empty or showing outdated schedule
no evacuation assembly point signage visible outside building

description: Classroom door security deficient — lock non-functional, no clear window covering, or barricade device missing
visual_signals: classroom door lock mechanism visibly broken or missing
classroom door window without opaque covering for lockdown use
classroom door without interior lock capability requiring key from hallway only

description: Visitor management failure — individuals without visible badges or tailgating through secure entries
visual_signals: adult in school hallway without visible visitor badge or lanyard
person following staff member through secure door without badging in
visitor sign-in area unstaffed with exterior door unlocked to main building

description: Security camera non-functional, obstructed, or showing blind spot in coverage area
visual_signals: security camera with lens obscured by dirt, cobwebs, or object
camera housing hanging loose or pointed at wall instead of coverage area
visible gap in camera coverage at entry point or corridor intersection

description: Perimeter fencing damaged, incomplete, or gates left unlocked during school hours
visual_signals: gap or hole in perimeter chain-link fence large enough for person entry
fence section leaning or knocked down creating uncontrolled access
perimeter gate standing open and unlocked during school hours

description: Cafeteria safety hazard — wet floors unmarked, hot surface accessible to students, or allergen signage missing
visual_signals: wet cafeteria floor near serving line without wet floor sign
hot food serving surface accessible without sneeze guard or barrier
food serving area without posted allergen warning signs

description: Gymnasium safety hazard — damaged equipment, unsafe floor surface, or missing wall padding
visual_signals: basketball backboard or hoop mounting hardware loose or cracked
gym floor with warped or buckling sections creating trip hazard
bare brick or concrete wall near basketball court without protective padding

description: Science lab missing eyewash station, fume hood non-functional, or chemical storage unlocked (OSHA 1910.1450)
visual_signals: science lab without visible eyewash station or emergency shower
fume hood in science classroom with sash stuck or no airflow indicator
chemical storage cabinet in science room unlocked and accessible to students

description: Asbestos or lead paint notice missing, ACM in poor condition, or monitoring records not posted in older buildings
visual_signals: asbestos notification not posted in building known to contain ACM
pipe insulation with damaged or crumbling fibrous wrapping in older school
peeling or chipping paint on walls or window frames in pre-1978 building

description: ADA accessibility deficiency — ramp in poor condition, inaccessible restrooms, or missing signage
visual_signals: wheelchair ramp with cracked surface or missing handrails
restroom without ADA accessibility sign or hardware
accessible route blocked by temporary furniture or equipment

description: Fire extinguisher missing, expired, or improperly placed in school building (NFPA 10)
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher wall mount bracket in corridor
fire extinguisher with expired inspection tag visible
fire extinguisher on floor or hidden behind furniture instead of mounted

description: Sprinkler head obstructed or clearance below 18 inches not maintained in school building (NFPA 25)
visual_signals: stored materials or decorations within 18 inches of sprinkler head
sprinkler head painted over or covered by ceiling decoration
items stacked on top of tall shelving unit directly below sprinkler

description: Emergency lighting in corridors and stairwells non-functional or missing (NFPA 101)
visual_signals: emergency light unit in hallway with no illumination during test
stairwell emergency light with cracked lens or missing lamp head
corridor emergency light with visible red fault indicator

description: PA or intercom system showing signs of non-functionality affecting emergency communication
visual_signals: classroom intercom speaker with dangling wires or broken housing
PA system speaker in corridor missing or hanging from mount
intercom call button panel in classroom visibly damaged or disconnected

description: Vehicle barriers or bollards missing or damaged at pedestrian entrances creating anti-ram vulnerability
visual_signals: main school entrance with wide vehicle approach and no bollards or planters
bollard at entrance bent or knocked from foundation
vehicle barrier gap wide enough for car to pass through to building entrance

description: Portable classroom or trailer with safety deficiency — missing tie-downs, damaged stairs, or inadequate fire exits
visual_signals: portable classroom without visible ground anchor or tie-down straps
portable classroom stairs with broken tread or missing handrail
portable building with only one exit door and no secondary emergency exit

description: Portable classroom ramp in poor condition or not ADA compliant
visual_signals: portable classroom ramp with warped or rotting deck surface
ramp to portable without handrails on both sides
ramp slope visibly steeper than standard ADA grade

description: Playground entrapment hazard from openings between 3.5 and 9 inches that could trap child head or body (CPSC)
visual_signals: gap between playground bars or slats in head entrapment size range
opening in equipment railing or barrier sized to trap small child
V-shaped opening at bottom of slide or equipment creating wedge trap

description: School building exterior lighting inadequate creating dark zones at entries, parking, or walkways
visual_signals: burned-out exterior light fixture at school building entrance
dark parking lot area with non-functional pole light
shadowed walkway between buildings with no operational lighting

description: Parking lot and student drop-off zone safety — missing crosswalk markings, speed signs, or traffic control
visual_signals: faded or missing crosswalk striping in school parking lot
school zone speed limit sign missing or obscured by vegetation
student drop-off area without clear lane markings or traffic flow signs

description: Fire door in school held open improperly without magnetic hold-open device connected to fire alarm
visual_signals: fire-rated corridor door propped open with wedge or doorstop
fire door self-closer disconnected or broken in school hallway
fire door between corridor sections unable to close and latch properly

description: Classroom or corridor windows with security film absent where required by safety plan
visual_signals: ground-floor classroom windows without visible security film application
corridor window glass without laminate layer visible at edge
large glass panel at school entrance without ballistic or security film

description: Emergency lockdown procedures not posted in classrooms or staff areas
visual_signals: classroom without visible lockdown procedure card or poster
no emergency procedure flip chart near classroom door
staff area missing posted active threat response instructions

description: Bleacher or stadium seating structural deficiency creating fall or collapse hazard
visual_signals: gymnasium bleacher with bent or missing support brace
bleacher seat board cracked or splintered
bleacher guardrail at top row missing or below required height

description: Electrical outlet or panel in student-accessible area without proper cover or protection
visual_signals: electrical outlet in elementary classroom missing cover plate
electrical panel in hallway with door open or missing cover
exposed wiring visible from damaged outlet in student area
